CustomField.defaultValue: "Font: Courier" & BR() & "Width: 350" & BR() & "Height: 50" & BR() & "Rotation: -45" & BR() & "Color code: #808080"
CustomField.description: Optional key/value style settings for generated watermarks. Supported keys: Font, Width, Height, Rotation, Color code.
CustomField.label: Watermark Style
